property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Flow API Name
property.description: API name of the Flow to launch

property.name: parentObject
property.label: Parent Object Label
property.description: Enter the Object Label to pass to the Flow

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: Text to display on the launch button

property.name: refreshOnFinish
property.label: Refresh Page on Flow Finish?
property.description: If checked, the page will refresh at the end of the flow when the modal closes.
